---
title: "04_BiodiversityMetrics"
author: "Rhiannon Nolan"
date: "2026-04-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F)
```

## Load packages

```{R}
#install necessary packages
if (!require(rstudioapi)){install.packages("rstudioapi")}
me <- (rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path) #get current file name
wd <- dirname(me)

if (!require(renv)){ install.packages("renv")}

#because I use an old version of iNEXT
if(!require(iNEXT)){remotes::install_version("iNEXT", version = "2.0.20")}

packs <- unique(renv::dependencies(me)$Package) #list of packages needed 

for (i in seq_along(packs)){
  if (!require(packs[i], character.only=T)){ #install any missing pacls
    install.packages(packs[i])
  }
}

lapply(packs, library, character.only=T) #load packages

rm(me, packs, i) #clean env

```

## Import Data

```{r}
load(paste0(wd, "/Data/align_dat.RData")) #load in data with time alignments
```

## Plot Biodiversity data
```{r}

```
